query:
SELECT a.id, a.nome, a.status, COUNT(p.id) as total_procedimentos 
FROM arquivos a 
LEFT JOIN procedimentos p ON p.arquivoId = a.id 
WHERE a.nome LIKE '%demonstrativo%' 
GROUP BY a.id, a.nome, a.status 
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
